name: Mutual NDA
description: A balanced, mutual non-disclosure agreement (NDA) for two parties to share confidential or proprietary information for a specified business purpose. Covers confidential information definitions, receiving party obligations, standard exceptions, and governing law.

name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: The cover page template to accompany the Mutual NDA standard terms. Specifies the business purpose, agreement duration, confidentiality protection period, governing law, and signature blocks for both parties.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: A comprehensive SaaS subscription agreement governing access to and use of a cloud-hosted service. Covers service access, user accounts, data privacy, payment terms, liability caps, indemnification, confidentiality, and GDPR compliance hooks.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: An SLA addendum that establishes measurable uptime commitments and support response time standards for a cloud service. Defines how downtime is calculated, excludes force majeure events, and provides for service credits and termination rights when targets are missed.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: An agreement for early-access design partners who test and provide structured feedback on a product before general availability. Governs product access, feedback ownership, confidentiality, intellectual property assignment, and use restrictions.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: A professional services agreement for engaging a provider to deliver custom work, consulting, or implementation services. Covers deliverables, change orders, acceptance, intellectual property ownership, payment, warranties, indemnification, and insurance.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: A GDPR-compliant data processing agreement (DPA) that governs how a service provider processes personal data on behalf of a customer. Includes provisions for processor/subprocessor relationships, data subject rights, security incident response, international data transfers (EEA SCCs and UK Addendum), and audit rights.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: A general commercial partnership agreement for co-marketing, referral, reseller, or integration relationships. Covers each party's obligations, trademark licensing, payment terms, escalation procedures, confidentiality, indemnification, and liability caps.

name: Software License Agreement
description: An on-premises or installable software license agreement granting a limited, non-exclusive right to install and use software. Covers license scope and restrictions, open source disclosures, updates, payment, warranty, indemnification, and export controls.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: A short-term pilot or proof-of-concept agreement allowing a customer to evaluate a product for a defined period before committing to a long-term subscription. Covers evaluation-only access, restrictions, AS-IS disclaimer, limited liability, confidentiality, and what happens if no definitive agreement is signed.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: A HIPAA-compliant Business Associate Agreement (BAA) between a covered entity and a service provider (business associate) that handles protected health information (PHI). Covers permitted uses and disclosures of PHI, safeguards, subcontractors, breach notification, individual rights, and PHI destruction upon termination.

name: AI Addendum
description: An addendum to a cloud service or software agreement that addresses the use of artificial intelligence and machine learning features. Governs input and output ownership, model training restrictions, non-training improvement rights, personal data obligations, and disclaimers about the nature and accuracy of AI-generated content.
